item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response stays in direct metric-trend judgment, does not invoke triage or treat the prompt as repeated local repair, and provides a decision analysis centered on the missing direction of the complaint-rate gap.
